'''Aldivy''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] backwater [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]].

==History==
Discovered by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] circa [[3000 BBY]], it had previously been located in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] controlled by [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan's]] [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. After the defeat of the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] during the [[New Sith Wars]], the [[Planet/Legends|world]] joined the Republic, remaining loyal over the next millennia until the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Aligning with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the planet was incorporated in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in exchange for loyalty. Aldivy's capital, [[Greenton]], was the location of the headquarters of [[Lachany Foods]]. When the Empire was upended by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the city of [[New Oldtown]] suffered the wrath of [[Apwar Trigit]], an agent of Warlord [[Zsinj]]'s empire. Destroying the city, the planet was cast into fear as the Imperials battled for control against the fledgling New Republic. Remaining neutral for a century, the planet was controlled by [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] as of [[137 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
